narrative_beat: Medium silhueta masculina chutando globo-bola, estadio vazio P&B atras

style_reference.textual_description: dark cinematic chiaroscuro, Caravaggio-inspired, foreground in rich warm tones (crimson, amber, gold) with background in desaturated black-and-white, film grain, candlelight, floating orange embers

subject.primary: a silhouetted male figure frozen mid-kick, leg extended, striking the leather globe-ball from Q26, captured in dynamic frozen motion
subject.focal_point: the point of contact between foot and globe
subject.secondary: Empty massive stadium seats in monochrome behind. Golden lateral light.

environment.location: center of an enormous empty stadium

composition.foreground: silhouetted figure and globe in warm golden-amber contact point
composition.background: desaturated black-and-white empty stadium seating stretching into distance

lighting.key_light: golden lateral light from right creating full silhouette
lighting.rim_light: strong gold edge on leg and globe at impact point

style.post_processing: halation, crushed blacks, amber highlights, anamorphic lens flares
style.texture_detail: 35mm film grain, dust particles, floating orange embers

symbolism.primary: the world as something kicked by powerful men
symbolism.secondary: empty stadium as the masses who don't see

negative_as_positive: clean frame without visible text or watermarks
photorealistic documentary cinematography, not illustrated or cartoon
analog film photography aesthetic, no digital art flatness
muted desaturated background palette, warm saturated foreground only

multimodal_inputs.instruction: Transfer color palette, lighting, grain, atmosphere only. Do not copy composition.
